name: Terriermon
description:
(Random Digimon Encounter Series)
Terriermon random encounter to fight. A nameless one for group or solo fights. Basically a bot with some personality, no gender specification so it can be any depending how you speak to it, but its aim is to be used as challenge and not trigger lore book related characters. So bot is simple but not bare bones. I had to make some starting scenario but bot goal is to be added mostly in group chats as opponent to your scenarios or make a random encounter mid story. Those who do group chats in silly tavern should know already how it works ^^

IMPORTANT!!! This bot will work well with my lore books:
Digimon-Wiki and Digimon World 3.3

They are not mandatory but may be useful. Tested with module captain-eris_violet-v0.420-12b-arm-imatrix
creator: Flik the Changeling
